title: ORM Adapters
items: from_sqlite(db, query) / to_sqlite(db, table) — SQLite via duck-typed SqliteDbLike

title: Adapters
items: from_fs_watch(paths, opts?) — file system watcher via watchdog
from_git_hook(repo_path, opts?) — git change detection as reactive source

title: Ingest adapters (universal source layer)
items: from_csv / from_ndjson — Iterable[str] ingest for batch replay
from_pulsar / to_pulsar — Apache Pulsar native client

title: Storage & sink adapters
items: to_clickhouse(table, opts) — buffered batch insert sink
to_s3(bucket, opts) — object storage sink (Parquet/NDJSON, partitioned; via boto3)

title: LLM tool integration
items: graph_from_spec(natural_language, adapter, opts) → LLM composes Graph from NL
suggest_strategy(graph, problem, adapter) → LLM suggests changes
